config.description: Run-level configuration: timeouts, browser settings, etc.

timeoutSeconds.description: Default timeout in seconds for all tests.

version.description: Chrome version tag (e.g., '148.0.7778.56'). Defaults to the pinned version.

items.description: Items to deploy: services, databases, brokers, and mocks.

variables.description: Definition-level variables shared by all tests. Supports $ref for cross-file sharing. Test-level variables override these. Values can be any JSON type (string, number, boolean, array, object).

oneOf.description: Path to a shared variable file (e.g., '../shared/db-vars.json').
Paths to shared variable files, merged left-to-right.

additionalProperties.description: Variable value — any JSON type. Strings support {{interpolation}}.

tests.description: Test definitions to run against the deployed namespace.

oneOf.description: Relative path to a shared fragment file (e.g., '../shared/postgres.json').
Paths to shared fragment files, merged left-to-right. Later files override earlier ones.

name.description: Unique name (DNS label). Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, 1-63 chars.

stage.description: Bootup stage (0-based). Stage N+1 waits until all stage N items are healthy. Defaults to 0.

port.description: Port the service listens on inside the container.

healthCheck.description: Health check: HTTP path (e.g., '/health') or 'tcp' for TCP port check (non-HTTP services).

uiPath.description: URL path to the service's UI (e.g., '/').

command.description: Override the Docker image's default CMD (e.g., ["server", "/data"]).

mountFiles.description: Files to mount into the container (read-only).

source.description: Relative path from this file to the source file.

env.description: Environment variables passed to the container.

localDevPath.description: Local source path for dev hot-reload.

mountPath.description: Container mount path for local dev source.

name.description: Unique name (DNS label). Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, 1-63 chars.

stage.description: Bootup stage (0-based). Stage N+1 waits until all stage N items are healthy. Defaults to 0.

command.description: Override the Docker image's default CMD (e.g., ["php", "app/worker.php", "databases"]).

mountFiles.description: Files to mount into the container (read-only).

source.description: Relative path from this file to the source file.

env.description: Environment variables passed to the container.

localDevPath.description: Local source path for dev hot-reload.

mountPath.description: Container mount path for local dev source.

name.description: Unique name (DNS label). Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, 1-63 chars.

stage.description: Bootup stage (0-based). Stage N+1 waits until all stage N items are healthy. Defaults to 0.

image.description: Custom Docker image (overrides engine default, e.g., 'getlago/postgres-partman:15.0-alpine').

version.description: Database image version tag (e.g. "16" for postgres:16). Must start with a digit. Defaults to a sensible version per engine.

noAuth.description: Skip all authentication. Database starts without credentials. Cannot be combined with dbName, dbUser, or dbPassword.

initFilePath.description: Path to init file relative to .dokkimi/init-files/.

initFilePaths.description: Array of init file paths (run in order).

name.description: Unique name (DNS label). Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, 1-63 chars.

stage.description: Bootup stage (0-based). Stage N+1 waits until all stage N items are healthy. Defaults to 0.

version.description: Broker image version tag (e.g. "3" for rabbitmq:3). Must start with a digit.

port.description: Port the broker listens on inside the container.

healthCheck.description: Health check: HTTP path or 'tcp' for TCP port check.

command.description: Override the Docker image's default CMD.

env.description: Environment variables passed to the container.

name.description: Unique name (DNS label). Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, 1-63 chars.

mockMethod.description: HTTP method to match, or '*' for any.

mockOrigin.description: Service making the request, or '*' for any.

mockRequestBodyContains.description: Substring match against the serialized request body (case-insensitive). Mutually exclusive with mockRequestBodyMatches.

mockRequestBodyMatches.description: Regex match against the serialized request body (case-sensitive; use (?i) for case-insensitive). Mutually exclusive with mockRequestBodyContains.

mockDelayMs.description: Artificial delay in milliseconds before responding.

mockResponseStatus.description: HTTP status code for the mock response.

oneOf.description: JSONPath expression (e.g. $.response.body.id)
Regex extraction rule — resolve a JSONPath, then apply a regex pattern.

group.description: Capture group index (default 1; use 0 for full match).

mockResponseBody.description: Response body. Can be a JSON object/array or a string.

name.description: Unique name (DNS label). Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, 1-63 chars.

oneOf.description: JSONPath expression (e.g. $.response.body.id)
Regex extraction rule — resolve a JSONPath, then apply a regex pattern.

group.description: Capture group index (default 1; use 0 for full match).

name.description: Unique name (DNS label). Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, 1-63 chars.

SharedVariableFile.description: A shared variable file: flat key-value pairs referenced via $ref from definition or test variables.

oneOf.description: JSONPath expression (e.g. $.response.body.id)
Regex extraction rule — resolve a JSONPath, then apply a regex pattern.

group.description: Capture group index (default 1; use 0 for full match).

ActionFragment.description: A shared action fragment file. Contains a reusable action definition referenced via $ref on a step's action field.

StepFragment.description: A shared UI sub-step fragment file. Contains reusable sub-steps (e.g., a login flow) referenced via $ref inside a UI action's steps array.

steps.description: Ordered UI sub-steps to splice into the referencing action.

RefFragment.description: A shared fragment that inherits from another fragment via $ref. Inline fields are shallow-merged as overrides on top of the referenced file.

oneOf.description: Relative path to a base fragment file (e.g., './base-service.yaml').
Paths to base fragment files, merged left-to-right.

context.description: Path to the Docker build context directory.

dockerfile.description: Dockerfile path relative to the build context. Defaults to 'Dockerfile'.

oneOf.description: JSONPath expression (e.g. $.response.body.id)
Regex extraction rule — resolve a JSONPath, then apply a regex pattern.

group.description: Capture group index (default 1; use 0 for full match).

timeoutSeconds.description: Timeout for this test. Overrides definition-level timeout.

forEach.description: Test-level forEach — run all steps once per item.

for.description: Test-level for — run all steps once per numeric value.

repeat.description: Test-level repeat — run all steps up to count times, optionally stopping on until.

variables.description: Variables for {{interpolation}} in actions and assertions. Supports $ref for cross-file sharing. Overrides definition-level variables. Values can be any JSON type.

oneOf.description: Path to a shared variable file (e.g., '../shared/db-vars.json').
Paths to shared variable files, merged left-to-right.

additionalProperties.description: Variable value — any JSON type. Strings support {{interpolation}}.

steps.description: Sequential test steps. Use a 'parallel' action to run multiple actions concurrently.

stopOnFailure.description: Stop the test on assertion failure (default true).

forEach.description: Step-level forEach — repeat action+extract+assertions per item.

for.description: Step-level for — repeat action+extract+assertions per numeric value.

repeat.description: Step-level repeat — repeat action+extract+assertions up to count times.

extract.description: Extract variables from the response for use in subsequent steps.

oneOf.description: JSONPath expression (e.g. $.response.body.id)
Regex extraction rule — resolve a JSONPath, then apply a regex pattern.

group.description: Capture group index (default 1; use 0 for full match).

assertions.description: Assertion blocks to validate after the action completes.

ActionRef.description: Reference a shared action fragment file. Inline fields are shallow-merged as overrides.

$ref.description: Relative path to an action fragment file (e.g., '../shared/create-user.yaml').

oneOf.description: JSONPath expression (e.g. $.response.body.id)
Regex extraction rule — resolve a JSONPath, then apply a regex pattern.

group.description: Capture group index (default 1; use 0 for full match).

body.description: Request body (JSON). String values support {{variable}} interpolation.

forEach.description: Action-level forEach — repeat only this action per item; extract+assertions run once after.

for.description: Action-level for — repeat only this action per numeric value.

repeat.description: Action-level repeat — repeat only this action up to count times.

database.description: Name of the DATABASE item to query.

query.description: SQL query or MongoDB command. Supports {{variable}} interpolation.

forEach.description: Action-level forEach — repeat only this query per item.

for.description: Action-level for — repeat only this query per numeric value.

repeat.description: Action-level repeat — repeat only this query up to count times.

forEach.description: Action-level forEach — repeat only this wait per item.

for.description: Action-level for — repeat only this wait per numeric value.

repeat.description: Action-level repeat — repeat only this wait up to count times.

target.description: Name of a SERVICE item the browser will load. Maps to that service's internal URL.

steps.description: Ordered UI sub-steps (visit, click, type, waitFor, extract, screenshot). Entries can also be { $ref: 'path' } to splice in shared sub-step fragments, or loop groups with nested steps.

actions.description: Actions to execute concurrently. All actions in this array run in parallel.

UiSubStepRef.description: Reference a shared UI sub-step fragment file. The fragment's steps array is spliced into this position.

$ref.description: Relative path to a sub-step fragment file (e.g., '../shared/login-flow.yaml').

UiSubStepGroup.description: A loop group inside a UI action's steps array. Repeats the nested steps per iteration of the loop modifier.

forEach.description: Iterate over an array of items.

repeat.description: Repeat up to count times, optionally until assertions pass.

steps.description: UI sub-steps to repeat per iteration.

UiSubStep.description: A single UI sub-step. Object has EXACTLY ONE discriminator key (visit / click / type / waitFor / extract / screenshot / scroll / select / hover / key / upload / drag / viewport) plus an optional `timeoutMs` sibling for per-sub-step timeout override.

visit.description: Navigate. Bare path resolves against the target's base URL; absolute URL is used verbatim. Supports {{variable}} interpolation.

click.description: CSS selector to click. Supports {{variable}} interpolation.

type.description: Focus and type text into the matching element.

oneOf.description: CSS selector to wait for visibility. Supports {{variable}}.

text.description: Optional: wait until the element's text equals this. Supports {{variable}}.

extract.description: Pull values off the page into variables. Each key becomes a variable name.

pattern.description: Regex pattern (optional post-processing on the raw value).

group.description: Capture group index when pattern is set (default 1; 0 for full match).

oneOf.description: Take a full-page PNG of the current viewport, tagged with this name. Short form — equivalent to { name: "..." } with no selector and no match block.

Take a PNG, optionally region-scoped via `selector` and/or compared against a checked-in baseline via `match`. Baselines live at .dokkimi/<project>/baselines/<name>.png; the diff runs post-run in Control Tower. First run with no baseline surfaces under `dokkimi baselines pending` for approval.

name.description: Artifact name (and baseline lookup key when `match` is set). Maps to screenshot/<name>.png under the instance's artifact dir. Must be unique per test.

selector.description: Optional CSS selector — when set, only that element's bounding box is captured (else full page).

oneOf.description: true → run the post-run baseline diff with default options. false → no diff (equivalent to omitting the key).
Run the post-run baseline diff with custom options. Compares against .dokkimi/<project>/baselines/<name>.png.

threshold.description: Fraction of pixels allowed to differ before the diff fails (default 0.01 = 1%).

ignoreRegions.description: Selectors masked out before diffing (timestamps, ad slots, animated content, user avatars).

oneOf.description: CSS selector — scroll the matching element into view. Supports {{variable}}.
Scroll the page (or an element) to absolute pixel coordinates.

select.description: Set the value of a native <select> element and dispatch a change event.

hover.description: CSS selector to hover over (synthetic mouseover/mouseenter). Supports {{variable}}.

oneOf.description: Named key to send to the focused element (Enter, Tab, Escape, ArrowUp, etc.).

selector.description: Optional CSS selector to focus first. Supports {{variable}}.

key.description: Named key (Enter, Tab, Escape, ArrowDown, …) or single character. Supports {{variable}}.

upload.description: Attach files to an <input type="file"> element. Paths must exist inside the test-agent container.

selector.description: CSS selector for the file input. Supports {{variable}}.

drag.description: Synthesize a mouse drag from one element to another. Works for HTML5 native drag and most JS drag libraries (react-dnd, dnd-kit) that listen on real mouse events.

from.description: CSS selector for the drag source. Supports {{variable}}.

to.description: CSS selector for the drop target. Supports {{variable}}.

viewport.description: Set the browser viewport dimensions. Persists across subsequent UI actions until changed.

timeoutMs.description: Per-sub-step timeout in milliseconds. Overrides the executor's 30s default for this sub-step only.

forEach.description: Assertion-block forEach — run these assertions once per item. items can be a $.path into the document or a {{variable}} reference.

for.description: Assertion-block for — run these assertions for each value in a numeric range.

repeat.description: Assertion-block repeat — run assertions up to N times with optional until condition.

assertions.description: Field assertions evaluated against the root document ($.response, $.match, $.variables, etc.).

extract.description: Extract variables from the current document context.

oneOf.description: JSONPath expression (e.g. $.response.body.id)
Regex extraction rule — resolve a JSONPath, then apply a regex pattern.

group.description: Capture group index (default 1; use 0 for full match).

MatchCriteria.description: Filter an array in the root document. Use where clauses with $$ to reference each candidate entry.

path.description: Root document path to the array to filter (e.g. '$.traffic', '$.consoleLogs').

where.description: Filter conditions. Each entry uses $$.field to reference the candidate element.

oneOf.description: Exact expected count of matched entries.

count.description: Assert on the number of matched entries. Integer for exact match, or {operator, value} object.

as.description: Save matched entries to a variable accessible as $.variables.<name> in subsequent blocks.

WhereEntry.description: A filter condition for match.where. Use path for assertion form, or or/and/not for combinators.

path.description: Path into the candidate entry (must start with '$$.').

value.description: Expected value. Supports {{variable}} interpolation in strings.

or.description: Logical OR — at least one entry must match.

and.description: Logical AND — all entries must match.

not.description: Logical NOT — entry must not match.

Assertion.description: An assertion with exactly one source field (path, count, type, keys, values, or entries) plus an operator and optional value.

oneOf.description: Dotted path to the value (e.g. '$.response.status', '$.match.request.body.amount').
Path with transform — resolve a path and apply a transform before comparing.

count.description: Source field shorthand — get the length of the array/object at this path.

type.description: Source field shorthand — get the JS type of the value at this path.

keys.description: Source field shorthand — get the keys of the object at this path.

values.description: Source field shorthand — get the values of the object at this path.

entries.description: Source field shorthand — get [key, value] pairs of the object at this path.

value.description: Expected value. Can be a literal, {{variable}}, or a ValueRef object {from, transform?}.

LoopBodyProperties.description: Properties that can appear inside any loop body. Which ones are valid depends on the level (test, step, assertion-block) — the CLI validator enforces level rules.

steps.description: Steps to execute per iteration (test-level loops).

assertions.description: Assertions to validate per iteration. At step level these are AssertionBlock objects; at assertion-block level these are flat Assertion objects.

ForEachLoop.description: Iterate over an array of items. Each iteration sets the loop variable (as) to the current item. Place loop body content (steps, assertions, extract) inside this object.

oneOf.description: Inline array of items to iterate over.
Variable reference ({{varName}}) or JSONPath ($.response.body.items) resolving to an array.

as.description: Variable name for the current item. Access fields via {{as.field}}.

name.description: Optional loop name. When set, exposes loop metadata as a variable: {{name.index}}, {{name.items}}, {{name.completed}}, {{name.iterations}}.

ForLoop.description: Numeric range loop. Iterates from 'from' to 'to' (inclusive) with optional step. Place loop body content (steps, assertions, extract) inside this object.

step.description: Increment per iteration. Positive for ascending, negative for descending. Must not be 0. Defaults to 1; use negative step for descending ranges.

as.description: Variable name for the current numeric value.

name.description: Optional loop name. When set, exposes loop metadata as a variable: {{name.index}}, {{name.completed}}, {{name.iterations}}.

RepeatLoop.description: Repeat a fixed number of times, optionally stopping early when 'until' assertions all pass. Place loop body content (steps, assertions, extract) inside this object.

as.description: Variable name for the current iteration index (0-based).

name.description: Optional loop name. When set, exposes loop metadata as a variable: {{name.completed}}, {{name.iterations}}.

until.description: Assertions checked after each iteration. When ALL pass, the loop stops early. The loop always executes at least once.

ExtractRuleWithTransform.description: Extract and transform an object into an array (keys, values, or entries).

from.description: Variable reference ({{varName}}) to use as the source object. Alternative to path.

transform.description: How to convert the object to an array.
